title: Reset Password Guide
content:
Reset Password Guide

1. Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen.
2. Enter your registered email address.
3. Verify the OTP sent to your email.
4. Create a new password.
If your account is locked due to multiple failed attempts, please contact the IT Help Desk directly.

title: Leave Balance Guide
content:
Leave Balance Guide

To view your leave balance, follow these steps:
1. Go to the Dashboard.
2. Navigate to the HR Portal.
3. Click on 'Leave Management'.
4. Select 'My Leave Balance'.
This page displays your available, used, and remaining leave.

title: Payroll and Payslips
content:
Payroll Guide

Payslips are generated on the 25th of every month. You can view or download them by going to the HR Portal -> Payroll -> My Payslips. If you notice any discrepancies in your salary, please raise a ticket with the Finance department.

title: IT Support and Equipment
content:
IT Support Policy

For broken hardware (like laptop screens) or persistent network issues, please bring your device to the IT Service Desk on the 2nd floor, or call extension 4004. A temporary replacement laptop can be issued while yours is under repair.
